app.selectWorkspace: Create or select a workspace to start.

home.noSources: Add a local folder/file, clone a git repository or wiki, or fetch GitHub issues to start.
home.syncTitle: Pull latest from remote and re-index
home.noDocuments: Write markdown notes here — they're indexed and citable like any source.
home.chatsHint: Chats live in the sidebar — pick one or start a "+ New chat".
home.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: Delete workspace "{{name}}"? Local folders stay on disk; app-managed clones are removed.

chat.hint: Ask about this workspace — answers cite the indexed sources.
chat.hintLocal: Local model by default; external providers always ask before sending.
chat.placeholder: Ask about your code and docs… (Ctrl+Enter or ⌘+Enter to send)
chat.placeholderAgent: Tell the agent what to do… (Ctrl+Enter or ⌘+Enter)
chat.saveAsDocTitle: Save chat as an in-app document
chat.exportTitle: Export chat as a markdown file
chat.allowActionsTitle: Let the agent create issues / write wiki pages
chat.agentHint: The agent can search sources and take the enabled actions.

citation.openInApp: Open in the in-app code editor

editor.title: Document title
editor.needTitle: Give the document a title first.

consent.title: Send sources to {{provider}}?
consent.body: This question would send the following parts of your workspace to an external AI API ({{model}}):

settings.title: AI Providers
settings.note: Local (Ollama) is the default and needs no key. External providers are BYOK — keys are stored in the OS keychain, never in the database, and every external request shows you what would be sent first.
settings.allowSendCode: Allow sending code snippets to this provider
settings.rerank: Rerank results with the local LLM (slower, higher quality)
settings.searchSaved: Saved. Re-index workspaces after changing the embedding model.
settings.connectorsNote: Connect external services so the agent can act on them (post to Slack, create Notion/Confluence pages, file Asana/Backlog tasks). Tokens are stored in the OS keychain. Every action still needs your per-message approval in Agent mode.
settings.usageNote: Every model call is logged locally with the exact source files that were included in the prompt. Costs are rough estimates.

publish.title: Publish
publish.wikiNote: Clone a wiki first (git URL ending in .wiki.git) to publish pages.

ollama.installHint: Install it (brew install ollama) and start it with `ollama serve` — the local model powers offline answers.
